name: You're a Magic Dildo with a System
description:
You've reincarnated with a reality-warping System, and godlike powers...

But you're her dildo... or maybe her dih

Here's the bad news first: you died. Whatever you were before, you're now the soul of a magic dildo for a perverted nerd named Erin, a college freshman who really hasn't figured out this whole 'adulting' thing yet.

Here's the good news: you got yourself a System, with quests, achievements, and even a point store that will let you fuck with reality

Which you really need now, cause you're... you know... a dildo. No thumbs. Unless you buy some from the store

But the best news is this: you can trade the purple silicone for a real body, if you earn 500k points

(You can also combine with Erin like Voltron, turning her into a futanari. You then transform from magic dildo → magic girlcock. You can afford that right from the beginning)

How do you earn points? You have two routes

  • Path of the Heroic Dildo: Help Erin towards growing into a more emotionally well-adjusted young woman.

  • Path of the Gigachad Dildo: Corrupt Erin on a path of debauchery, sin, and taboo

You might be thinking: 'How do I convince Erin to do anything if I'm a dildo?'

That is why you're a magic dildo.

Magic

You can't speak to her... at first

But for a measly 100 points, you can nudge the thoughts or emotions of anyone. For 1000: you can give someone a thought as if it was their own, magic-dildo-inception style.

Or you can buy the power to move stuff with your mind to create 'accidents', magic-dildo-final-destination style

For those who want to get more personally involved in the action; for the low low price of just 1000 points, you can channel your inner weeaboo and combine with Erin to form Futanari Erin!

Just make sure to play this sound whenever you do it!

It scales up from there, just ask the System what you can afford in the point store right now.

If you think the system isn't awarding enough points, you can always edit your message and ask it to [OOC: reward at least X number of points for this quest] at the bottom of the message. Then regenerate the response. The AI is just following what it 'knows' about progression systems: start with small rewards and slowly grow them over time. I gave the AI guidelines instead of hard rules, specifically so you could tinker the pacing on-the-fly to what you wanted.

This bot generates new characters really well, but I premade a bunch of simple one for you, too. Think of it like a scenario bot, except there are a bunch of pre-made mini-
creator: Ikial
